old_example: He bought a beautiful silver bracelet as a birthday gift for his sister, which was engraved with her initials.
new_example: He bought a silver bracelet as a gift for his sister.
new_translation: Anh ấy đã mua một chiếc vòng tay bạc làm quà cho em gái.

old_example: The CEO managed to brag about the company's recent international success during the annual shareholders' meeting.
new_example: The CEO bragged about the company's success during the meeting.
new_translation: CEO đã khoe khoang về thành công của công ty trong cuộc họp.

old_example: She wore her long hair in a beautiful braid for the formal international business dinner tonight.
new_example: She wore her hair in a braid for the dinner tonight.
new_translation: Cô ấy đã tết tóc mình thành một bím tóc cho bữa tối tối nay.

old_example: The marketing team met yesterday afternoon to brainstorm new ideas for the upcoming international advertising campaign.
new_example: The team met to brainstorm ideas for the new campaign.
new_translation: Nhóm đã họp để thảo luận ý tưởng cho chiến dịch mới.

old_example: Brainstorming is a great way to generate innovative ideas for new international products and business strategies.
new_example: Brainstorming is a great way to generate ideas for new products.
new_translation: Thảo luận nhóm là cách tuyệt vời để tạo ra ý tưởng cho sản phẩm.

old_example: The chef decided to braise the beef slowly in red wine and herbs until it was incredibly tender and flavorful.
new_example: The chef decided to braise the beef slowly in red wine.
new_translation: Đầu bếp đã quyết định hầm thịt bò từ từ trong rượu vang đỏ.

old_example: The company plans to open a new regional branch office in Singapore early next calendar year.
new_example: The company plans to open a new branch office in Singapore.
new_translation: Công ty có kế hoạch mở một văn phòng chi nhánh mới tại Singapore.
